title: breynia disticha var. neocaledonica
intro: Breynia disticha var. neocaledonica, also known as the Neocaledonian Snowflake, is a flowering plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to New Caledonia, with medicinal properties that have been utilized in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and soothe digestive issues. Breynia disticha var. neocaledonica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
